request.description: Complete app redesign to match ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini standards with simplified UI and flexible API key system
request.prdContent:
# Requirements Document

## 1. Application Overview

### 1.1 Application Name
Next-Gen Multi-AI Chat Platform

### 1.2 Application Description
An advanced AI chatbot platform featuring both solo and multi-person group chat capabilities with multiple AI models. Users can create soulful AI chatbots with customizable advanced prompts, manage conversation memory, and interact through a modern, upgraded interface. The platform supports simultaneous multi-model conversations, image generation, friend/anonymous contacts, and rich media interactions.

## 2. Users & Usage Scenarios

### 2.1 Target Users
- Users seeking advanced AI chat experiences with customizable AI personalities
- Users wanting group conversations with multiple AI models simultaneously
- Users interested in creating soulful AI chatbots with memory capabilities
- Users requiring sophisticated prompt customization at higher levels
- Users preferring both solo and group chat modes

### 2.2 Core Usage Scenarios
- Creating and customizing soulful AI chatbots with advanced prompts
- Engaging in solo one-on-one conversations with customized AI
- Participating in group chats with multiple AI models responding simultaneously
- Managing conversation memory across sessions
- Switching between solo and group chat modes
- Generating images and sharing media within conversations
- Configuring multiple advanced prompt sections for different AI personalities

## 3. Page Structure & Functionality

```
Next-Gen Multi-AI Chat Platform
├── Main Chat Interface
│   ├── Solo Chat Mode
│   ├── Group Chat Mode
│   ├── Chat View
│   ├── Model Selector
│   ├── Mode Switcher (Solo/Group)
│   ├── Add Friend/Anonymous Option
│   └── Image Input/Output Area
├── AI Chatbot Creation & Customization
│   ├── Prompt Configuration Panel
│   ├── Multiple Prompt Sections
│   ├── Memory Settings
│   └── Personality Customization
├── API Key Management Modal
└── Settings Panel
```

### 3.1 Main Chat Interface
**Purpose:** Primary interaction space for solo and group AI conversations with upgraded modern UI

**Core Functions:**
- Display chat messages in upgraded modern interface
- Support two chat modes: Solo Chat and Group Chat
- Mode Switcher to toggle between solo and group conversations
- Send text messages to AI models
- Upload and send images as input to AI models
- View AI-generated images inline within chat
- Access model selector to choose or switch AI models
- Add friend or anonymous contact option
- Display current active AI model names
- Show stickers, photos, and rich media in chat responses
- Maintain conversation memory across sessions
- Display AI responses with personality and soul based on custom prompts

**Solo Chat Mode:**
- One-on-one conversation with single selected AI model
- Full customization of AI personality through advanced prompts
- Dedicated memory management for individual AI chatbot
- Personalized interaction based on configured prompt sections

**Group Chat Mode:**
- Multi-person group chat with multiple AI models responding simultaneously
- Each AI model responds based on its own custom prompt configuration
- Visual distinction between different AI model responses
- All selected AI models participate in conversation
- Group memory shared across all AI participants

**Model Selector:**
- Dropdown menu showing all available AI models
- Supported models:
  - GPT-4, GPT-3.5-turbo
  - Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini Pro
  - Groq Llama 3 8B, Groq Mixtral
  - Claude 3 Opus, Claude 3 Sonnet
  - All models available in Kai9000 open source app
- Solo mode: select one model
- Group mode: select multiple models for simultaneous conversation
- Visual indicator of currently active models

**Add Friend/Anonymous:**
- Button to add friend or anonymous contact
- Simple contact addition process
- Contacts appear in chat list

**Image Input/Output:**
- Upload button for sending images to AI
- Display AI-generated images inline
- Support image generation via Nano Banana API

### 3.2 AI Chatbot Creation & Customization
**Purpose:** Advanced configuration interface for creating soulful AI chatbots with sophisticated prompt management

**Core Functions:**
- Create new AI chatbot with custom name and personality
- Configure multiple advanced prompt sections
- Set up conversation memory parameters
- Define AI behavior, tone, and response style
- Save and manage multiple chatbot configurations
- Edit existing chatbot prompts and settings
- Delete or archive chatbot configurations

**Prompt Configuration Panel:**
- Multiple prompt sections for layered personality definition
- Advanced prompt editor with syntax support
- Prompt sections include:
  - Core Personality Prompt: defines fundamental character traits
  - Contextual Behavior Prompt: guides situational responses
  - Knowledge Domain Prompt: specifies expertise areas
  - Interaction Style Prompt: defines communication patterns
  - Memory Integration Prompt: controls how past conversations influence responses
  - Emotional Response Prompt: configures empathy and emotional intelligence
- Each section supports detailed, higher-level prompt engineering
- Preview functionality to test prompt configurations
- Template library for advanced prompt structures

**Memory Settings:**
- Enable/disable conversation memory for each chatbot
- Configure memory retention duration
- Set memory priority levels for different conversation topics
- Memory context window size adjustment
- Clear or reset memory for specific chatbot

**Personality Customization:**
- Define chatbot name and avatar
- Set response length preferences
- Configure creativity vs accuracy balance
- Establish conversation flow patterns
- Define special capabilities or knowledge areas

### 3.3 API Key Management Modal
**Purpose:** Simplified API key input and management

**Core Functions:**
- Add API keys for all supported models
- Simple input fields with model labels
- Automatic prompt configuration for each model
- Save and validate API keys
- Edit or delete existing keys
- Clear error messages if key validation fails

**Supported API Keys:**
- OpenAI API key
- Google Gemini API key
- Groq API key
- Anthropic Claude API key
- Nano Banana API key for image generation
- All model API keys supported by Kai9000

### 3.4 Settings Panel
**Purpose:** Application configuration and management

**Core Functions:**
- Access API key management
- Configure default AI model for solo chat
- Select default AI models for group chat
- Adjust chat display preferences
- Manage contact list
- Access chatbot creation and customization interface
- Configure memory settings globally
- Manage saved chatbot configurations

## 4. Business Rules & Logic

### 4.1 Direct Chat Experience
- App launches directly into chat interface
- Users can start chatting immediately with default AI model
- No onboarding or tutorial screens
- Upgraded modern UI with enhanced visual design

### 4.2 Solo vs Group Chat Mode
- Solo Chat: one user conversing with one customized AI chatbot
- Group Chat: one user conversing with multiple AI models simultaneously
- Mode switching available at any time
- Each mode maintains separate conversation threads
- Memory management differs between solo and group modes

### 4.3 Multi-Model Support
- Users can switch between AI models in solo mode
- Users can select multiple models for group chat
- Each model uses its own API key
- Automatic prompt configuration for each model
- Custom prompts override default model behavior
- If one AI model fails, others continue responding in group mode

### 4.4 Advanced Prompt System
- Multiple prompt sections for sophisticated AI personality creation
- Higher-level prompt engineering beyond basic configurations
- Each chatbot can have unique prompt configuration
- Prompts integrate with conversation memory
- Prompt sections work together to create soulful AI responses
- Users can save and reuse prompt templates

### 4.5 Conversation Memory
- Memory enabled for each customized chatbot
- Conversation history influences AI responses
- Memory persists across sessions
- Users can clear or reset memory
- Memory context integrates with custom prompts
- Group chat maintains shared memory across all AI participants

### 4.6 API Key Management
- Simplified API key addition process
- Clear error messages if API key fails validation
- Users must add at least one valid API key to use chat features
- API keys stored securely
- Automatic prompt setup when API key is added

### 4.7 Image Generation & Input
- Image generation powered by Nano Banana API
- Users can request image generation within chat
- Users can upload images as input to AI models
- Generated images display inline in chat
- Uploaded images are sent to AI for analysis or response

### 4.8 Contact System
- Users can add friends or anonymous contacts
- Simple addition process
- Contacts appear in chat interface
- Switch between AI chat and contact chat

### 4.9 Rich Media Support
- AI responses include stickers, photos, GIFs
- Media displays inline within chat
- Contextually relevant media responses

## 5. Exception & Boundary Cases

| Scenario | Handling |
|----------|----------|
| API key validation fails | Display clear error message, allow user to re-enter key |
| No API keys configured | Prompt user to add API key before chatting |
| AI model fails to respond in solo mode | Display error, suggest switching to different model |
| One AI model fails in group mode | Other models continue responding, show error for failed model |
| All AI models fail in group mode | Display error, allow retry or model reconfiguration |
| Image generation fails | Show error message, allow retry |
| Image upload fails | Display upload error, allow retry |
| Invalid image format uploaded | Show format error, list supported formats |
| Nano Banana API unavailable | Notify user, disable image generation temporarily |
| Network connection lost | Display connection error, allow retry when reconnected |
| Contact addition fails | Show error message, allow retry |
| Memory storage fails | Notify user, conversation continues without memory |
| Invalid prompt configuration | Show validation error, prevent saving until corrected |
| Prompt section exceeds length limit | Display warning, allow editing to reduce length |
| Chatbot creation fails | Show error message, allow retry |
| Memory retrieval fails | Conversation continues without historical context, notify user |

## 6. Acceptance Criteria

1. App launches directly into chat interface with upgraded modern UI
2. Users can switch between Solo Chat and Group Chat modes
3. Solo Chat supports one-on-one conversation with customized AI chatbot
4. Group Chat supports multiple AI models responding simultaneously
5. Users can create soulful AI chatbots with advanced prompt customization
6. Multiple prompt sections available for higher-level personality configuration
7. Prompt sections include Core Personality, Contextual Behavior, Knowledge Domain, Interaction Style, Memory Integration, and Emotional Response
8. Conversation memory persists across sessions for each chatbot
9. Users can enable/disable and manage memory settings
10. Users can add API keys for GPT, Gemini, Groq, Claude, and Nano Banana
11. API key addition process is simple with clear error messages
12. Users can select multiple AI models for group chat
13. Each AI model in group chat responds based on its custom prompt configuration
14. Users can upload images as input to AI models
15. Users can generate images via Nano Banana API within chat
16. Generated images display inline in chat messages
17. Users can add friends or anonymous contacts
18. AI responses include stickers, photos, and GIFs
19. Automatic prompt configuration works for all supported models
20. Custom prompts override default model behavior
21. If one AI model fails in group mode, others continue responding
22. All models from Kai9000 open source app are available
23. UI is upgraded, modern, and market-ready
24. Chatbot creation interface supports saving and managing multiple configurations
25. Memory integration works seamlessly with custom prompts
26. Users can preview and test prompt configurations before saving

## 7. Out of Scope for Current Release

- Voice input/output functionality
- Video call features
- Real-time translation
- Advanced analytics dashboard
- Blockchain integration
- Multi-user group chats with human participants
- Mobile native applications
- Offline mode
- Advanced content moderation tools
- Social media sharing features
- Conversation export functionality
- Memory import from other AI services
- Persona marketplace
- Emotional state tracking visualization
- Third-party plugin integration
- Custom API endpoint configuration

content.text: {"versionDesc":"Complete app redesign to match ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini standards with simplified UI and flexible API key system","versionId":"app_version-bl01w1ootgcg","versionLabel":"v9"}
